ocr_text: 戰士的基本配備 Warrior's Essential Gears 「稱爾戈，比爾干，立爾矛，予其誓」—《尚書‧牧誓》 舉起你的戈，排開你的盾，豎起你的矛，我在此立誓 《尚書‧牧誓》是在周人與商人決戰前夕，周武王隊伍及西土盟友發表的誓師詞。頁首的這句話透露周軍配備，即戈、干、矛。對手商王朝軍隊的基本配備也… Lift up your dagger-axes, join your shields, raise your spears —Here I have an oath to make. -The Oath at Mu, The Book of Documents "Oath at Muye" records King Wu of Zhou's oath before the decisive battle against… It mentions the essential gears of Zhou soldiers, including dagger-axes, spears and… 為戰而生的戈：古文字中與戰爭有關的字 The Dagger-axes Born for War — Ancient Characters Related to Warfare 許多與戰爭相關的字皆含有「戈」。Many characters related to warfare contain "ge" as one of their radicals. 「伐」，象以戈砍人的脖子，有發動戰爭的意思。"Fa" resembles using a dagger-axes to strike at a person's neck, symbolizing the initiation of war. 「戒」，象雙手持戈，有警戒之意。"Jie" depicts two hands holding a dagger-axes, expressing a state of vigilance.
caption: 牆面展板介紹周代戰士基本配備戈干矛，旁有實物戈展示
notes: 牆面大段介紹文字與展品同框，故判 mixed

ocr_text: 商晚期至西周早期 銅弓形器 Bow-shaped fitting Late Shang period to early Western Zhou period, ca. 1300-977 BCE 故銅002321
caption: 銅弓形器名稱牌

ocr_text: 武器? 車馬器? — 弓形器怎麼用 Weapon? Chariot equipment? Two opinions on the function of the bow-shaped implement 弓形器集中出現於商晚期至西周早期之間。目前仍不清楚其具體功能。一種說法是作為弓弣，固定於弓背中央。拉弓到一定程度會抵住弓體，避免拉弓過度；弛弓則可懸掛於腰。另一種說法是掛轡勾，固定於腰間，御手在馬車奔馳過程中可將轡繩掛於此處，以騰出雙手使用兵器。(1)弓弣 Handle riser (when pulling a bow, the device will brace against the bow body after reaching a certain point, preventing over-pulling) (2)掛轡勾 Bridle hook
caption: 弓形器功能解說圖板，附弓弣與掛轡勾兩種用途線圖
兩件展品近景：左為小型喇叭狀器置白座，右為弓形器一端

ocr_text: 策，即馬鞭。河南殷墟小屯出土例證顯示這類玉器在商代可裝於馬鞭末端。商代馬鞭屬於短杖的形式，而非皮革軟鞭。During the Shang Dynasty, such jade objects could be attached to the ends of horsewhips to stimulate horses. Horsewhips of the Shang period took the form of short rods rather than soft leather whips.
caption: 牆面解說「策（馬鞭）」段落，附短杖式馬鞭線圖

ocr_text: 商代 玉鏃 推測由玉戈改制 Jade arrowhead presumably modified from dagger-axe Shang period, ca. 1600-1046 BCE 贈玉000814 商晚期 玉弭 Jade bow-nock-shaped im… Late Shang period, ca. 1300-1046 BCE 關於這類器物的功能尚有爭議。其中一種是根據殷墟小屯出土例證，推測是裝於弓兩端的弓末器，用於繫弦。另有認為弭是用解開繩結，包含解轡繩。There is still controversy regarding the function of these objects. One speculation is that they were bow-end fittings attached to both ends of the bow, used for securing the bowstring. Another belief is that "mi" were used for untying knots, including untying reins.
caption: 玉鏃、玉弭等玉器展示櫃，附名稱牌與功能解說
notes: 玉弭名稱牌與右側部分被遮，英文截斷

ocr_text: 青銅兵器種類大全 Bronze Age Arsenal: List of Bronze Weapons 長兵 Polearms 需加裝長柄使用的兵器，可增加攻擊距離與打擊力量。Weapons that need a long handle attached, making attacks reach farther and hit harder. 短兵 Short weapons 握柄較為短的兵器，通常可以直接持握。Weapons with a relatively short grip, typically designed to be held directly. 遠射 Projection weapons 利用拋擲或彈射方式攻擊的兵器，攻擊距離較遠。Weapons using throwing or projectile methods, ideal for long-range attacks. 護具 Body armor 武力衝突中保護身體的器具。Protective gear used to safeguard the body during conflicts.
caption: 青銅兵器分類圖板：長兵、短兵、遠射、護具四類附圖示

ocr_text: 西周的軍隊：殷八師 The Army of Western Zhou: the Eight Armies of Yin 他叫逨，參與西周初年征東夷立功，受賞貝錢，用作祭祀禮器。銘文出現的「殷八師」是周人滅商之後成守成周的軍隊。銘文亦紀錄了逨的上司名字「伯懋父」，即周文王之孫，擔任殷八師的統帥。His name is Lai, who participated and contributed to the success in military campaigns against Dongyi during the early years of Western Zhou. The "Eight Armies of Yin" mentioned in the inscription refers to the army responsible for guarding the capital of Chengzhou following the Zhou conquest of Shang. The inscription also records the name of Lai's superior, Bo Maofu, who was the grandson of King Wen of Zhou and served as the commander-in-chief of the Eight Armies of Yin.
caption: 牆面介紹西周軍隊「殷八師」，附青銅器銘文照片
